title: Messages with token counts on assistant messages

messages.content: Explain the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning.

Supervised learning uses labeled training data — the model learns a mapping from inputs to known outputs. Unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data, such as clustering or dimensionality reduction, without predefined target labels.
Give me a real-world example of each.
Supervised: email spam detection — trained on emails labeled spam/not-spam. Unsupervised: customer segmentation — grouping customers by purchasing behavior without predefined categories.
